project_metadata.description: A cinematic, fully animated, single-scroll romantic anime-themed web experience for Meera (Thango), inspired by 'Your Name' and 'Weathering With You'. Features: sakura petals, moonlight sky, glowing stars, glassmorphism, soft hover effects, memory cards, heartfelt love letter, live love counter, and final emotional message — every section premium-crafted, dreamy, and mobile-first.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Create an ultra-premium, anime-inspired romantic landing page dedicated for Meera ('Thango') to deliver deeply emotional, cinematic, and magical experience as an interactive love story.
project_metadata.target_audience: Meera ('Thango') — and optionally by romantic partners seeking inspiration for premium anime-themed romance web experiences.
key_features: Anime romance theming with cinematic atmosphere and smooth scrolling
Full-screen sakura petal, moon, and stars animation
Hero section, love counter, emotional scenes, memory gallery
Magical transitions, layered glowing particles and hearts
Mobile responsive, maximally immersive, single landing page

pages.purpose: Sole cinematic landing destination for Meera ('Thango'), designed to deliver a magical anime-themed romantic experience within a single page.
pages.description: The Home page fully expresses a romantic anime love story in a single-scroll cinematic journey. Layout: vertical stack of animated, emotional themed sections, beginning with a full-screen loading experience, then an immersive glassmorphic hero, leading into cinematic, interactive love story vignettes, a floating-card love letter, memory gallery, moonlit emotional climactic scene, and ending with a glowing, magical statement of love. Every section is fully animated: sakura petals (canvas, overlayed and fade-transitioned across scrolls), glowing and glass morphic layers, particle/heart floating layers, smooth text transitions. Dreamy anime-inspired color palette (deep pinks, purples, blues); soft rounded borders on all floating panels. The UI always feels emotional, magical, and cute. Page is 100% mobile responsive with all animations and cinematic atmosphere scaling smoothly. No login/signup/auth UI is present by design.
pages.content_notes: All UI is implemented on a single Home page with no routing beyond '/'. LoadingScreen overlays the entire UI on load, then fades. 'Enter Our Story' smoothly scrolls via animated transition to LoveStorySection. MemoryGallery uses only local asset images. Sakura petals and floating hearts persist across all sections, implemented via layered canvas. Form/interactive backend features are omitted per premium art-site focus (pure front end, no account or save features). Header and Footer are minimal yet always styled with frosted glass and glowy pastel gradients.

navigation.style: glassmorphic floating bar, dreamy glowing blur

theme.design_dna: Anime romance, glassmorphic overlays, pastel-dream palette. Fonts: Rounded, soft, anime-like sans-serif for main; highlight headings with hand-drawn/cursive for premium emotion. Always glowy, blurred drop-shadows. Sakura petals, hearts, floating particles, twinkling stars, layered throughout. All elements have motion. Buttons: pill-shaped, glowy, lightly glassmorphic with hover/active/focus shadows. Cards/panels: glassmorphic with strong border-radius and soft inner-glow. Hero/Final: very strong large glow effects. Images: anime-styled or portrait-processed only. Spacing: generous (32-48px block, 16-24px inline) but mobile collapse to fit without overflow.
theme.color_scheme: Dreamy pink/purple/blue gradients over deep night, soft glass overlays, glowing highlights
theme.font_type: anime-inspired sans-serif for base, custom handwritten/cursive for magic lines
theme.border_radius: xl (24-32px), heavy on cards and main panels, softer (16px) elsewhere
theme.shadow_style: Strong radial glows under main panels, subtle glass highlights, floating section card shadows and particle glows
theme.animation_style: Smooth spring interpolations (Framer Motion), slow-blur fade for background transitions, looping sakura/stars/heart canvas animations
theme.interaction_style: Hover/focus triggers glow/pulse, buttons/hero CTAs scale/shine slightly, memory cards rise/pulse smoothly on hover/tap. Scroll-based background and transition effects throughout.

components.description: A glassmorphic translucent top bar that stays fixed at the top (z-40), spanning full width. Features a custom glowing site logo on the left: 'Thango's World', center-aligned. Navigation links are omitted for this single-page site. On mobile, the logo remains visible and resizes responsively. Glowing blurred background with subtle rainbow-pink/blue highlights. No login or account UI appears.
components.purpose: Site identity and always-present magical atmosphere, anchoring the page visually.

components.description: Full-screen animated overlay that covers the app on initial load. Background: dreamy, animated moonlit sky gradient with floating sakura petals and faint glowing stars (Canvas). Center: Typewriter animation types out "Loading Thango's World…" (large, semi-bold, white with subtle pink glow), followed by a soft fade-out transition when loading is done. Prevents scrolling. Mobile responsive: typing text and background resize smoothly.
components.purpose: Immersive entrance and first impression before main site appears, deepening suspense and emotion.

components.description: Glassmorphic, glowing center-aligned hero with pink/purple/blue gradient background, large moon and animated falling sakura petals. Title: "For My Meera ❤️" in extra-bold dreamy font, slightly glowing. Subtitle: "In a world full of temporary things, you became my forever ✨" in italic, elegant typestyle. Prominent 'Enter Our Story 💖' button with ambient glow & floating heart animation that triggers a smooth scroll to the Love Story section. Spaced with generous top/bottom padding.
components.purpose: Cinematic anime introduction with strong emotional impact and the first interactive call-to-action.

components.description: Section with a beautiful pink-blue moonlit sky background, sakura petals drifting via Canvas, and floating glowing hearts (CSS/JS). Features: Title 'Together Since April 17, 2025 ❤️' in hand-written anime font. Below: Live-animated 'love counter' that shows years, months, days, hours, and minutes since that date, updating every second. Hearts drift and pulse, reacting gently as the counter increments. Section card floats softly with glassmorphism on desktop, full-bleed with soft padding on mobile.
components.purpose: Showcase the length and passage of their love in an intimate, magical way.

components.description: Premium glassmorphic, frosted-glass look card (rounded-xl, blurred, semi-transparent) hugging the center of a dreamy anime night background. Contains 2 paragraphs of deeply emotional, romantic text crafted for Meera (Thango), using poetic, heartfelt language. Card emits a subtle pink/blue glow, with floating sakura and gently rising sparkles layered around it (Framer Motion). Soft shadow and warm highlights for a cinematic look. On mobile, card and text scale smoothly.
components.purpose: Deliver the heart of the sentimental experience with an emotional love letter, capturing the user's attention and emotion.

components.description: Horizontal scroller of 6-10 floating, anime-styled photo cards (provided via local assets), each with gentle glowing border, soft drop shadow, and pastel overlay. Cards have subtle rise-on-hover animation and extra glow, with each animating in on scroll. Each card can be tapped to expand briefly with a cinematic pulse effect (Framer Motion scaling), then closes on tap/click outside. Sakura petals and soft particles animate continuously in the background.
components.purpose: Bring cute, magical memories to life visually in an anime presentation.

components.description: Full-width moonlit night section featuring an oversized glowing moon (center-right), dense field of animated glowing stars, and foreground of flowing sakura petals (Canvas/JS). Section overlays use dreamy gradients, mist, and scattered sparkles. Slow, cinematic zoom-in/zoom-out animation. Text (centered below moon): a brief, emotionally powerful quote to set an emotional climax. Padding and sizing scale fluidly for mobile.
components.purpose: Heightens the sense of cinematic anime wonder and peaks the emotional arc mid-scroll.

components.description: Massive, ultra-glowing, center-aligned text: 'I LOVE YOU FOREVER DI THANGAMEYY 💖' set in an extra-large, ultra-glowy handwritten anime font, with cascading heart and petal animations above/below. Below, subtitle: 'No matter how many lifetimes exist… I will always choose you, Meera 🌸' in smaller, shimmering script. Entire section pulses gently with ambient glows and floating love particles. Smooth fade-in as scrolled into view. Scroll-end padding assures it is never clipped on mobile.
components.purpose: Culminating emotional message that leaves a strong memory and impression at the end of the experience.

components.description: Minimal, glassmorphic footer bar with pastel glass blur, subtle top border, and fading sakura petals overlaying softly. Centered tiny text: 'Made with love for Meera (Thango) • © 2025'. On mobile, scales smoothly to remain readable and float above content if needed. Transition in with subtle upward fade-in motion at scroll-end.
components.purpose: Gentle closure and extra touch of warmth/cuteness at the bottom of the experience, subtly enhancing the anime theme.

frontend.styling: Tailwind v4, glassmorphism utilities, custom CSS for sakura/star/heart canvas
frontend.animation: Framer Motion, GSAP or custom spring logic, requestAnimationFrame for particles/petals, CSS transitions
